item.dc:creator: Redshadow09

item.title: Nudevember: Lipatov (Mature)
item.description:
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov Since it's Nudevember and Thanksgiving, I'll share some cool art that I'm grateful for, I guess? This is marked Mature and has Mature in the title!! Also, none of these are remotely sexual really, just characters in normal everyday occurrences or fights that just happen to not be wearing clothing? I should note that not all of this artist's works are black and white (nor do all of them feature nudity) but for the sake of Imgur I feel black and white pictures are safer.
Red Sonja Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov
Thelana Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov I believe this character is a nudist from something called Age of Aenya. The writer seems to commission this particular artist a lot for drawings of this character. Really cool character design and concept from what I've seen.
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov Honestly, I want a video game like this. Like, nudity without sexual stuff. I guess that's what mods are for?
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov This one sounds like it was based on a Lord of the Rings fanfic?
Artist: Oleksiy Lipatov Just a couple of naked dudes ready to fight a horde of giant mushroom monsters.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: Revolutionary Graph
item.description: alt text: love a graph that's dropping a hint [2 graphs comparing wealth distribution: France (1760–1790) vs. US (2016), showing top 10% holding majority wealth, with sources]

item.title: Rejecting Fascists and Fascism as we do in Aotearoa
item.description: Our Aussie mates banned her from their shores not so long ago. Proud of my country for maintaining our universal rejection of fascists. Sauce: https://www.stuff.co.nz/culture/360502473/controversial-us-speaker-candace-owens-banned-new-zealand

item.title: Old pencil sharpeners were a lot more satisfying.
item.dc:creator: mocosoft

item.title: I won't do what you tell me
item.description:
For those that missed: 22 year old New Zealand Hana-Rawhiti-Mope-Clarke led a Haka while ripping up a bill proposing to strip powers from a treaty protecting native people of New Zealand.
The graphic was a raised left fist, symbolically representative of resistance, and colors were of the Maori flag, the Tino Rangatiratanga flag. Edit for Maori pronunciation, since there's not a consensus on how to phoneticize it. Feel free to Google a Maori person pronouncing it though.
item.dc:creator: StellaMatutina

Because of this comic I say “BWAAAAAHHHHH” all the time

Natasha Lyonne my beloved
THE ONLY VERSION OF HARRY POTTER I WILL RECOGNIZE a very Potter Musical

LOOK!! I googly eyed my wicked vinyl in preparation for the movie
Sent from my iPhone
I made my boyfriend Lego weed and a blunt when we first started dating
I also googly eyed my Nessie picture

item.title: Senator Fatima Payman stands up for herself in the Australian parliament.
item.description: Senator Fatima Payman has accused Pauline Hanson of being racist after her eligibility to sit in parliament was repeatedly questioned by the One Nation leader.

item.dc:creator: artsydoodle

item.title: Turkey frying again
item.description:
I made a post last year about this. Every thanksgiving we fry about 30 turkeys for the Thanksgiving day Alcathon. And that's probably the opposite of what you think it is lol.
In the recovery community, many of us have burned a lot of bridges and ruined a lot of relationships by the time we got clean and/or sober. So during the holidays we'll hold an Alcathon at an AA clubhouse, which is a 24 hour event with meetings held every other hour. For the Thanksgiving event, we put out a big spread. It's just to give people a place to go who haven't been able to repair the relationships with their families yet.
This is just one way to fry a turkey: We inject the legs, thighs, and breasts with a garlic herb butter made by a guy called Toney Chacherie. We get the oil somewhere around 300°F and let them go for somewhere around 45 minutes. Lower them in slowly, allow the moisture to cook out as you lower it in. The oil will let you know how slow to go. After enough time has passed, we check the internal temperature of the breast and thigh, as well as breaking the thigh slightly off to see if there's any pink meat in there. That's really all there is to it.
When it's done it poses like your mom for the camera.
Gotta make sure it's safe to eat
Freaking deli shoes dude MV EDIT: Send pictures of your pets please
item.dc:creator: IndustrialSparks
